understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem (+) by navigating through the tile grid, using horizontal movement and clicking to remove breakable blocks (x) to create paths, while avoiding spikes (u/v) that cause instant loss.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement via MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT causes the player to continue under gravity until landing on a solid tile or hazard; CLICK removes breakable blocks without advancing timers; gravity direction (DOWN or UP) determines fall destination; UNDO reverts the last action; landing on spikes loses, reaching the goal wins.
